name: ai-video-canvas
description: AI 视频画布 — 本地运行 AI 视频脚本 / 故事板 / 图生视频画布工具

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:h5: concurrently -k -n server,web,open -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health http://127.0.0.1:5173 && open-cli http://localhost:5173"
